title: iris versicolor var. virginica
intro: Iris versicolor var. virginica, also known as Blue Flag, is a perennial aquatic plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Blue Flag include its potential to reduce swelling, improve respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of fever. Blue Flag can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
